commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional tri-state `--inherit-from-before` flag to `gog sheets insert`, wires it into the Sheets `InsertDimensionRequest`, and updates tests plus generated command docs.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection of current main shows `gog sheets insert --after` always sends `inheritFromBefore=true` and there is no separate flag to send `false`; I did not run a live Google Sheets mutation in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair lane is needed; the PR now contains the narrow code, tests, docs, and CLI proof, so normal maintainer review and check completion are the remaining path.

target.title: feat(sheets): add --inherit-from-before to sheets insert
target.body:
Fixes #655.

## Problem
`gog sheets insert` always derived `InsertDimensionRequest.inheritFromBefore` from `--after`:
```go
inheritFromBefore := c.After
```
So there was no way to insert rows/columns with **plain** formatting next to a formatted neighbour тАФ the reported case: plain 0тАУ100 score columns inserted immediately after a currency-formatted column rendered as currency until the format was manually cleared.

## Change
Add a tri-state `--inherit-from-before` flag (`*bool`):
- **omitted** тАФ unchanged behaviour: inherit only when `--after` is set;
- `--inherit-from-before=false` тАФ force plain formatting (the reported need);
- `--inherit-from-before` тАФ force inheritance even on a before-insert.

Maps straight through to `InsertDimensionRequest.inheritFromBefore`. Command reference regenerated via `make docs-commands`.

## Real-behavior proof (built from this branch)

**`gog sheets insert --help`**:
```
      --inherit-from-before    Inherit number format / styling from the adjacent
                               row/column. Defaults to true with --after, false
                               otherwise; set to false to insert with plain formatting.
```

**`--dry-run` shows the flag controlling `inherit_from_before` (no API call):**
```
# default with --after  тЖТ inherits
$ gog sheets insert SHEET_ID Sheet1 rows 2 --after --dry-run --json
  тЖТ inherit_from_before: true

# explicit override: --after but DON'T inherit
$ gog sheets insert SHEET_ID Sheet1 rows 2 --after --inherit-from-before=false --dry-run --json
  тЖТ inherit_from_before: false

# explicit override: force inherit on a before-insert
$ gog sheets insert SHEET_ID Sheet1 rows 2 --inherit-from-before --dry-run --json
  тЖТ inherit_from_before: true
```

## Review follow-ups addressed
- **proof** тАФ added above (help + dry-run output showing the tri-state behaviour).
- **generated docs** тАФ ran `make docs-commands`; `docs/commands/gog-sheets-insert.md` now lists the flag.
- **CHANGELOG** тАФ no CHANGELOG edit in this PR (release notes are release-owned).

Tests: added two subtests over the existing httptest Sheets stub asserting wire-level `InheritFromBefore` for both override directions. `make fmt` + `make lint` + `go test ./internal/cmd/` green.
target.author: chrischall
labels: status: ЁЯСА ready for maintainer look
